understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to reach the '+' goal gem tile on each level by moving horizontally and using gravity to fall through open passages, while avoiding spike tiles.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was restricted to MOVE_LEFT and MOVE_RIGHT, after which gravity pulled the character down (or up) until landing on a solid tile or hazard. CLICK removed breakable blocks ('x') to open paths. Spikes ('u'/'v') ended the run if landed on. UNDO allowed reversing the last action. Each level had 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt. The corridor_scan showed landing positions for each column, and passages indicated where falling to a new y-level was possible.
